name: Auroral Ferrofluid-Monolith
description: A colossal liquid-metal monolith whose surface forms readable magnetic glyphs under strong bass, then collapses into chaotic auroral breakup on treble. Mouse drag rotates an external magnetic field that sculpts the ferrofluid in real time.

params.name: Spike Length
params.description: Base spike length (strongly amplified by bass into glyph structures)

params.name: Aurora Intensity
params.description: Strength of the surrounding auroral volumetric field

params.name: Magnetic Twist
params.description: Internal twisting of the monolith under magnetic forces

params.name: Fluid Metallic Response
params.description: How sharply the ferrofluid surface reflects and behaves metallically
